rationale: Educ. Code §29.084 governs tutorial services requirements for students scoring below 70. It contains no reference to homestead exemptions, property tax revenue, or funding levels. No direct conflict exists with increasing the §11.13(b) exemption.
quote: Sec. 29.084. TUTORIAL SERVICES. (a) Each school district may provide tutorial services at the district's schools.
_note: No textual or operational link between the proposed homestead exemption increase and this tutorial services statute.
